g.text: Each scanner output → common JSON schema { tool, domain, severity, resource, finding, timestamp }
All normalized findings, scan history, trends

svg.text: Scheduler (cron / Kubernetes CronJob): runs Prowler, Kubescape, Falco log pull, ScubaGear on schedule → normalizer → DB
On-demand path: dashboard → POST /trigger-scan → Redis queue → worker pod → normalizer → DB → WebSocket push to UI
